00027 #ifndef JELATINE_UTIL_H
00028 #   define JELATINE_UTIL_H (1)
00029 
00030 #include "wrappers.h"
00031 
00032 /******************************************************************************
00033  * Debugging facilites                                                        *
00034  ******************************************************************************/
00035 
00053 #ifndef NDEBUG
00054 
00055 extern void dbg_printf_internal(const char *, int, const char *, ...);
00056 #define dbg_printf( ... ) dbg_printf_internal(__FILE__, __LINE__, __VA_ARGS__)
00057 
00058 extern void dbg_error_internal(const char *, int, const char *, ...);
00059 #define dbg_error( ... ) dbg_error_internal(__FILE__, __LINE__, __VA_ARGS__)
00060 
00061 extern void dbg_unreachable_internal(const char *, int);
00062 #define dbg_unreachable() dbg_unreachable_internal(__FILE__, __LINE__)
00063 
00064 extern void dbg_warning_internal(const char *, int, const char *, ...);
00065 #define dbg_warning( ... ) dbg_warning_internal(__FILE__, __LINE__, __VA_ARGS__)
00066 
00067 #define dbg_abort() abort()
00068 
00069 #else
00070 
00071 #define dbg_printf( ... )
00072 
00073 #define dbg_error( ... ) \
00074 do { \
00075     fprintf(stderr, "ERROR: "); \
00076     fprintf(stderr, __VA_ARGS__); \
00077     fputc('\n', stderr); \
00078 } while (0) \
00079 
00080 #define dbg_warning( ... )
00081 #define dbg_unreachable()
00082 #define dbg_abort()
00083 
00084 #endif // !NDEBUG
00085 
00086 /******************************************************************************
00087  * String functions                                                           *
00088  ******************************************************************************/
00089 
00090 extern char *cstrchrnul(const char *, int);
00091 
00092 /******************************************************************************
00093  * Utility functions                                                          *
00094  ******************************************************************************/
00095 
00096 extern void sort_asc_uint16_ptrs(uint16_t *, void **, uint32_t);
00097 
00103 static inline size_t size_div_inf(size_t x, size_t y)
00104 {
00105     return (x + y - 1) / y;
00106 } // size_ceil_div()
00107 
00113 static inline size_t size_ceil(size_t x, size_t y)
00114 {
00115     return ((x + y - 1) / y) * y;
00116 } // size_ceil()
00117 
00123 static inline size_t size_floor(size_t x, size_t y)
00124 {
00125     return (x / y) * y;
00126 } // size_floor()
00127 
00133 static inline size_t size_max(size_t x, size_t y)
00134 {
00135     return (x > y) ? x : y;
00136 } // size_max()
00137 
00142 static inline int16_t load_int16_un_internal(const char *src)
00143 {
00144     int16_t res;
00145 
00146     memcpy(&res, src, sizeof(int16_t));
00147     return res;
00148 } // load_int16_un_internal()
00149 
00153 #define load_int16_un(src) load_int16_un_internal((const char *) (src))
00154 
00159 static inline uint16_t load_uint16_un_internal(const char *src)
00160 {
00161     uint16_t res;
00162 
00163     memcpy(&res, src, sizeof(uint16_t));
00164     return res;
00165 } // load_uint16_un_internal()
00166 
00170 #define load_uint16_un(src) load_uint16_un_internal((const char *) (src))
00171 
00176 static inline void store_int16_un_internal(char *dst, int16_t val)
00177 {
00178     memcpy(dst, &val, sizeof(int16_t));
00179 } // store_int16_un_internal()
00180 
00184 #define store_int16_un(dst, val) \
00185         store_int16_un_internal((char *) (dst), (val))
00186 
00191 static inline int32_t load_int32_un_internal(const char *src)
00192 {
00193     uint32_t res;
00194 
00195     memcpy(&res, src, sizeof(int32_t));
00196     return res;
00197 } // load_int32_un_internal()
00198 
00202 #define load_int32_un(src) load_int32_un_internal((const char *) (src))
00203 
00208 static inline void store_int32_un_internal(char *dst, int32_t val)
00209 {
00210     memcpy(dst, &val, sizeof(int32_t));
00211 } // store_int32_un_internal()
00212 
00216 #define store_int32_un(dst, val) \
00217         store_int32_un_internal((char *) (dst), (val))
00218 
00219 /******************************************************************************
00220  * Exception handling                                                         *
00221  ******************************************************************************/
00222 
00225 enum c_exception_class_t {
00226     JAVA_LANG_VIRTUALMACHINEERROR = 1, 
00227     JAVA_LANG_NOCLASSDEFFOUNDERROR 
00228 };
00229 
00231 typedef enum c_exception_class_t c_exception_class_t;
00232 
00236 #define c_try \
00237 {                                                       \
00238     int __exc__;                                        \
00239     jmp_buf __buf__;                                    \
00240     jmp_buf *__prev__ = thread_self()->c_exception.buf; \
00241     thread_self()->c_exception.buf = &__buf__;          \
00242     thread_self()->c_exception.data = 0;                \
00243     __exc__ = setjmp(__buf__);                          \
00244     if (__exc__ != 0) {                                 \
00245         thread_self()->c_exception.data = __exc__;      \
00246     } else
00247 
00252 #define c_catch(exc) \
00253     thread_self()->c_exception.buf = __prev__; \
00254 }                                              \
00255 (exc) = thread_self()->c_exception.data; \
00256 if (exc == 0) {                          \
00257 } else
00258 
00263 #if !NDEBUG
00264 extern void c_throw_dbg(const char *, int, int, const char *, ...)
00265                         ATTRIBUTE_NORETURN;
00266 #   define c_throw(exc, ...) c_throw_dbg(__FILE__, __LINE__, exc, __VA_ARGS__)
00267 #else
00268 extern void c_throw(int, const char *, ...) ATTRIBUTE_NORETURN;
00269 #endif // !NDEBUG
00270 
00271 extern void c_clear_exception( void );
00272 extern void c_print_exception(int);
00273 
00277 #define c_rethrow(exc) longjmp(*(thread_self()->c_exception.buf), (exc))
00278 
00279 /******************************************************************************
00280  * Time related functionality                                                 *
00281  ******************************************************************************/
00282 
00283 extern struct timespec get_time_with_offset(uint64_t ms, uint32_t nanos);
00284 
00285 #endif // !JELATINE_UTIL_H
